Off Calendar Sep-25-2002 Advanced From Oct-15-02 To Sep-27-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerks: P. Dias/J. Stokes; Reporter: Helen A. Sorep-Matley. John C. Brown, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff and there being no appearance by the defendant, the Court ordered the matter off the settlement calendar. The request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.

John C. Brown, Esq. of REDENBACHER & BROWN 409-8600, for plaintiff Horace Diamonon
